proposal.description: Path to proposal document (quick mode alternative to prd/design)

testCommand.description: Shell command for running project-wide tests (overrides auto-detection)

e2eRound.description: Current fix-e2e round counter. 0 = no failures yet. Incremented each time e2e tests fail and fix tasks are appended. Max 3 rounds.

breaking.description: When true, task completion triggers full test suite across all layers

scope.description: Task scope: must be explicitly set by breakdown-tasks using the Scope Assignment algorithm. 'all' for cross-layer, summary, gate, and T-test tasks; 'frontend'/'backend' for single-layer tasks in mixed projects.

mainSession.description: When true, run-tasks executes this task in the main session instead of dispatching to task-executor. Used by tasks that need to spawn subagents.

noTest.description: When true, this task does not require tests (e.g. documentation-only, summary tasks). Skips quality gate and test evidence checks. Coverage is auto-set to -1.0.
